title: Profile Viewer open with 2D secondary viewport visible
capture_instructions: Profile Viewer must be active so the screen is split into a 3D viewport (left) and a 2D orthographic viewport (right). Reclassify Points mode must be active (button highlighted in toolbar). Point cloud (Queens Campus Segmented) visible in both panels. No selection active.
ui_state: Profile Viewer active, Reclassify Points mode active, both 3D and 2D viewports visible, no active selection

annotations.label: Reclassify Points button — must be active/highlighted
